title: `attrmvcp` will not map attributes to cells starting with `$__`

features.name: module with dollar_dollar prefix and blackbox attribute
features.description: Code should include a module with name starting with $__ prefix and (* blackbox *) attribute with input and output ports

features.name: attrmvcp with dollar_dollar cell type pattern
features.description: Code should include attrmvcp command targeting cell type with $__ prefix where attributes fail to map correctly
